categories.name: Daily Adhkar
categories.description: Daily remembrances to keep your heart connected to Allah

duas.title: Ayat al-Kursi
duas.arabic: اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ ۚ لَا تَأْخُذُهُ سِنَةٌ وَلَا نَوْمٌ ۚ لَهُ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ ۗ مَنْ ذَا الَّذِي يَشْفَعُ عِنْدَهُ إِلَّا بِإِذْنِهِ ۚ يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ ۖ وَلَا يُحِيطُونَ بِشَيْءٍ مِنْ عِلْمِهِ إِلَّا بِمَا شَاءَ ۚ وَسِعَ كُرْسِيُّهُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ ۖ وَلَا يَئُودُهُ حِفْظُهُمَا ۚ وَهُوَ الْعَلِيُّ الْعَظِيمُ
duas.transliteration: Allahu la ilaha illa huwal-Hayyul-Qayyum, la ta'khudhuhu sinatun wa la nawm, lahu ma fis-samawati wa ma fil-ard, man dhalladhee yashfa'u 'indahu illa bi idhnihi, ya'lamu ma bayna aydeehim wa ma khalfahum, wa la yuheetuna bishay'in min 'ilmihi illa bima sha', wasi'a kursiyyuhus-samawati wal-ard, wa la ya'uduhu hifdhuhuma, wa huwal-'Aliyyul-'Adheem.
duas.translation: Allah! There is no deity except Him, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer of existence. Neither drowsiness overtakes Him nor sleep. To Him belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth. Who is it that can intercede with Him except by His permission? He knows what is before them and what will be after them, and they encompass not a thing of His knowledge except for what He wills. His Kursi extends over the heavens and the earth, and their preservation tires Him not. And He is the Most High, the Most Great.
duas.virtue: Whoever recites it in the morning will be protected until the evening, and whoever recites it in the evening will be protected until the morning.

duas.title: Master of Istighfar
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ رَبِّي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ، خَلَقْتَنِي وَأَنَا عَبْدُكَ، وَأَنَا عَلَى عَهْدِكَ وَوَعْدِكَ مَا اسْتَطَعْتُ، أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا صَنَعْتُ، أَبُوءُ لَكَ بِنِعْمَتِكَ عَلَيَّ وَأَبُوءُ لَكَ بِذَنْبِي فَاغْفِرْ لِي فَإِنَّهُ لَا يَغْفِرُ الذُّنُوبَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma anta Rabbi la ilaha illa Anta, khalaqtani wa ana 'abduka, wa ana 'ala 'ahdika wa wa'dika mastata't, a'udhu bika min sharri ma sana't, abu'u laka bi ni'matika 'alayya, wa abu'u laka bi dhanbi, faghfir li fa innahu la yaghfirudh-dhunuba illa Anta.
duas.translation: O Allah, You are my Lord, there is no deity but You. You created me and I am Your servant, and I am upon Your covenant and promise as much as I can. I seek refuge in You from the evil of what I have done. I acknowledge Your blessings upon me and I acknowledge my sin, so forgive me, for verily none forgives sins except You.
duas.virtue: If somebody recites this during the day with firm faith, and dies on the same day before the evening, he will be one of the people of Paradise; and if he recites it at night with firm faith, and dies before the morning, he will be one of the people of Paradise.

duas.title: Morning Tasbih
duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ
duas.transliteration: Subhan Allahi wa bihamdihi.
duas.translation: Glory is to Allah and praise is to Him.
duas.virtue: Whoever says this one hundred times in the morning and one hundred times in the evening will not be surpassed on the Day of Resurrection by anyone having done better than he except someone who had recited it more.

duas.title: Seeking Protection (3 Quls)
duas.arabic:
بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَنِ الرَّحِيمِ
قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ ۝ اللَّهُ الصَّمَدُ ۝ لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ ۝ وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ كُفُوًا أَحَدٌ
duas.transliteration: Bismillahir-Rahmanir-Raheem. Qul huwa Allahu ahad. Allahus-samad. Lam yalid wa lam yulad. Wa lam yakun lahu kufuwan ahad.
duas.translation: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful. Say: He is Allah, the One. Allah, the Self-Sufficient Master. He begets not, nor was He begotten. And there is none comparable to Him.
duas.virtue: Recite Surah Al-Ikhlas, Al-Falaq, and An-Nas three times in the morning and evening — it will suffice you in all respects.

duas.title: Morning Supplication
duas.arabic: أَصْبَحْنَا وَأَصْبَحَ الْمُلْكُ لِلَّهِ، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ، لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
duas.transliteration: Asbahna wa asbahal-mulku lillahi wal-hamdulillahi, la ilaha illallahu wahdahu la shareeka lahu, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamdu wa huwa 'ala kulli shay'in qadeer.
duas.translation: We have reached the morning and at this very time all sovereignty belongs to Allah. All praise is for Allah. None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone, without partner. To Him belongs all sovereignty and praise, and He is over all things omnipotent.
duas.virtue: Recite this in the morning to remember Allah and begin your day rightly.

duas.title: Protection from harm
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الَّذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيْءٌ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَهُوَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
duas.transliteration: Bismillahilladhi la yadurru ma'asmihi shay'un fil-ardi wa la fis-sama'i wa huwas-Samee'ul-'Aleem.
duas.translation: In the name of Allah, with whose name nothing on earth or in the heaven can cause harm, and He is the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing.
duas.virtue: Whoever recites it three times in the morning and evening, nothing will harm him.

duas.title: Evening Supplication
duas.arabic: أَمْسَيْنَا وَأَمْسَى الْمُلْكُ لِلَّهِ، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ، لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
duas.transliteration: Amsayna wa amsal-mulku lillahi wal-hamdulillahi, la ilaha illallahu wahdahu la shareeka lahu, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamdu wa huwa 'ala kulli shay'in qadeer.
duas.translation: We have reached the evening and at this very time all sovereignty belongs to Allah. All praise is for Allah. None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone, without partner. To Him belongs all sovereignty and praise, and He is over all things omnipotent.

duas.title: Evening Tasbih
duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ
duas.transliteration: Subhan Allahi wa bihamdihi.
duas.translation: Glory is to Allah and praise is to Him.
duas.virtue: Whoever says it a hundred times during the day, his sins are wiped away even if they are like the foam of the sea.

duas.title: Seeking Refuge from Evil
duas.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّاتِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ
duas.transliteration: A'udhu bi kalimatillahit-tammati min sharri ma khalaq.
duas.translation: I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from the evil of that which He has created.
duas.virtue: If anyone says this in the evening, no venomous creature will harm him that night.

duas.title: Trusting in Allah
duas.arabic: حَسْبِيَ اللَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ عَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ وَهُوَ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ
duas.transliteration: Hasbiyallahu la ilaha illa huwa, 'alayhi tawakkaltu wa huwa Rabbul-'Arshil-'Adheem.
duas.translation: Allah is sufficient for me. There is no deity except Him. I have placed my trust in Him, and He is Lord of the Great Throne.
duas.virtue: Whoever says this seven times in the morning and evening, Allah will suffice him in whatever concerns him.

duas.title: Before Sleeping
duas.arabic: بِاسْمِكَ اللَّهُمَّ أَمُوتُ وَأَحْيَا
duas.transliteration: Bismika Allahumma amutu wa ahya.
duas.translation: In Your name, O Allah, I die and I live.

duas.title: Last Two Verses of Al-Baqarah
duas.arabic: آمَنَ الرَّسُولُ بِمَا أُنْزِلَ إِلَيْهِ مِنْ رَبِّهِ وَالْمُؤْمِنُونَ ۚ كُلٌّ آمَنَ بِاللَّهِ وَمَلَائِكَتِهِ وَكُتُبِهِ وَرُسُلِهِ لَا نُفَرِّقُ بَيْنَ أَحَدٍ مِنْ رُسُلِهِ ۚ وَقَالُوا سَمِعْنَا وَأَطَعْنَا ۖ غُفْرَانَكَ رَبَّنَا وَإِلَيْكَ الْمَصِيرُ
duas.transliteration: Amanar-Rasulu bima unzila ilayhi mir-Rabbihi wal-mu'minun, kullun amana billahi wa mala'ikatihi wa kutubihi wa rusulihi, la nufarriqu bayna ahadin mir-rusulihi, wa qalu sami'na wa ata'na ghufranaka Rabbana wa ilaykal-maseer.
duas.translation: The Messenger has believed in what was revealed to him from his Lord, and so have the believers. All of them have believed in Allah and His angels and His books and His messengers, saying: 'We make no distinction between any of His messengers.' And they say, 'We hear and we obey. Grant us Your forgiveness, our Lord, and to You is the final destination.'
duas.virtue: Whoever reads these two verses at night, they will suffice him.

duas.title: Upon Waking Up
duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَحْيَانَا بَعْدَ مَا أَمَاتَنَا وَإِلَيْهِ النُّشُورُ
duas.transliteration: Alhamdu lillahilladhi ahyana ba'da ma amatana wa ilayhin-nushur.
duas.translation: All praise is for Allah who gave us life after having taken it from us, and unto Him is the resurrection.

duas.title: Sleeping on the Right Side
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ قِنِي عَذَابَكَ يَوْمَ تَبْعَثُ عِبَادَكَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma qini 'adhabaka yawma tab'athu 'ibadak.
duas.translation: O Allah, protect me from Your punishment on the Day You resurrect Your servants.

duas.title: Leaving the Home
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ، تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَى اللَّهِ، وَلَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ
duas.transliteration: Bismillahi, tawakkaltu 'alallahi, wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billah.
duas.translation: In the name of Allah, I place my trust in Allah, and there is no might nor power except with Allah.
duas.virtue: It will be said to him: You are guided, defended and protected. The devil will move away from him.

duas.title: Entering the Home
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ وَلَجْنَا، وَبِسْمِ اللَّهِ خَرَجْنَا، وَعَلَى اللَّهِ رَبِّنَا تَوَكَّلْنَا
duas.transliteration: Bismillahi walajna, wa bismillahi kharajna, wa 'alallahi Rabbina tawakkalna.
duas.translation: In the name of Allah we enter, and in the name of Allah we leave, and upon our Lord we place our trust.

duas.title: Entering the Mosque
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ افْتَحْ لِي أَبْوَابَ رَحْمَتِكَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma-ftah li abwaba rahmatik.
duas.translation: O Allah, open the doors of Your mercy for me.

duas.title: Leaving the Mosque
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka min fadlik.
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You from Your bounty.

categories.name: Prayer (Salah)
categories.description: Supplications related to the five daily prayers

duas.title: Before Starting Wudu
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ
duas.transliteration: Bismillah.
duas.translation: In the name of Allah.
duas.virtue: There is no wudu for the one who does not mention the name of Allah upon it.

duas.title: After Completing Wudu
duas.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا عَبْدُهُ وَرَسُولُهُ
duas.transliteration: Ashhadu an la ilaha illallahu wahdahu la shareeka lahu, wa ashhadu anna Muhammadan 'abduhu wa rasuluh.
duas.translation: I bear witness that none has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone, without partner, and I bear witness that Muhammad is His servant and Messenger.
duas.virtue: The eight gates of Paradise will be opened for him and he may enter from whichever gate he wishes.

duas.title: Dua After Wudu (Extended)
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْنِي مِنَ التَّوَّابِينَ وَاجْعَلْنِي مِنَ الْمُتَطَهِّرِينَ
duas.transliteration: Allahummaj'alni minat-tawwabeena waj'alni minal-mutatahhireen.
duas.translation: O Allah, make me among those who repent and make me among those who purify themselves.

duas.title: Opening Dua (Subhanaka)
duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ اللَّهُمَّ وَبِحَمْدِكَ، وَتَبَارَكَ اسْمُكَ، وَتَعَالَى جَدُّكَ، وَلَا إِلَهَ غَيْرُكَ
duas.transliteration: Subhanakallahumma wa bihamdika, wa tabarakasmuka, wa ta'ala jadduka, wa la ilaha ghairuk.
duas.translation: Glory is to You O Allah, and praise. Blessed is Your Name and Exalted is Your Majesty. There is none worthy of worship but You.

duas.title: Opening Dua (Wajjahtu)
duas.arabic: وَجَّهْتُ وَجْهِيَ لِلَّذِي فَطَرَ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ حَنِيفًا وَمَا أَنَا مِنَ الْمُشْرِكِينَ، إِنَّ صَلَاتِي وَنُسُكِي وَمَحْيَايَ وَمَمَاتِي لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ
duas.transliteration: Wajjahtu wajhiya lilladhi fataras-samawati wal-arda haneefan wa ma ana minal-mushrikeen. Inna salati wa nusuki wa mahyaya wa mamati lillahi Rabbil-'alameen.
duas.translation: I have turned my face to the One who created the heavens and the earth, as a true believer, and I am not among the polytheists. Indeed, my prayer, my sacrifice, my living, and my dying are for Allah, Lord of all the worlds.

duas.title: In Ruku (Bowing)
duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ رَبِّيَ الْعَظِيمِ
duas.transliteration: Subhana Rabbiyal-'Adheem.
duas.translation: Glory is to my Lord, the Most Great.

duas.title: Rising from Ruku
duas.arabic: سَمِعَ اللَّهُ لِمَنْ حَمِدَهُ ، رَبَّنَا وَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ
duas.transliteration: Sami'allahu liman hamidah. Rabbana wa lakal-hamd.
duas.translation: Allah hears whoever praises Him. Our Lord, to You is all praise.

duas.title: In Sujud (Prostration)
duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ رَبِّيَ الْأَعْلَى
duas.transliteration: Subhana Rabbiyal-A'la.
duas.translation: Glory is to my Lord, the Most High.

duas.title: Supplication in Sujud
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي ذَنْبِي كُلَّهُ، دِقَّهُ وَجِلَّهُ، وَأَوَّلَهُ وَآخِرَهُ، وَعَلَانِيَتَهُ وَسِرَّهُ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma-ghfir li dhanbi kullahu, diqqahu wa jillahu, wa awwalahu wa akhirahu, wa 'alaniyyatahu wa sirrahu.
duas.translation: O Allah, forgive me all of my sins — the small and the great, the first and the last, the public and the private.

duas.title: Between Two Prostrations
duas.arabic: رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي، رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي
duas.transliteration: Rabbighfir li, Rabbighfir li.
duas.translation: My Lord, forgive me. My Lord, forgive me.

duas.title: Istighfar after Salaam
duas.arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ
duas.transliteration: Astaghfirullah.
duas.translation: I seek forgiveness from Allah.

duas.title: Tasbeeh after Prayer
duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ
duas.transliteration: Subhanallah.
duas.translation: Glory is to Allah.
duas.virtue: Say SubhanAllah 33 times, Alhamdulillah 33 times, Allahu Akbar 33 times, then complete the hundred with La ilaha illallahu wahdahu la shareeka lahu, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamdu wa huwa 'ala kulli shay'in qadeer.

duas.title: Tahmid after Prayer
duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ
duas.transliteration: Alhamdulillah.
duas.translation: All praise is for Allah.

duas.title: Takbir after Prayer
duas.arabic: اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ
duas.transliteration: Allahu Akbar.
duas.translation: Allah is the Greatest.

duas.title: Completion of 100
duas.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
duas.transliteration: La ilaha illallahu wahdahu la shareeka lahu, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamdu wa huwa 'ala kulli shay'in qadeer.
duas.translation: None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone, without partner. To Him belongs all sovereignty and praise, and He is over all things omnipotent.
duas.virtue: His sins will be forgiven even if they are as abundant as the foam of the sea.

duas.title: Dua al-Qunut
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اهْدِنِي فِيمَنْ هَدَيْتَ، وَعَافِنِي فِيمَنْ عَافَيْتَ، وَتَوَلَّنِي فِيمَنْ تَوَلَّيْتَ، وَبَارِكْ لِي فِيمَا أَعْطَيْتَ، وَقِنِي شَرَّ مَا قَضَيْتَ، فَإِنَّكَ تَقْضِي وَلَا يُقْضَى عَلَيْكَ، وَإِنَّهُ لَا يَذِلُّ مَنْ وَالَيْتَ، تَبَارَكْتَ رَبَّنَا وَتَعَالَيْتَ
duas.transliteration: Allahummah-dini feeman hadayt, wa 'afini feeman 'afayt, wa tawallani feeman tawallayt, wa barik li feema a'tayt, wa qini sharra ma qadayt, fa innaka taqdi wa la yuqda 'alayk, wa innahu la yadhillu man walayt, tabarakta Rabbana wa ta'alayt.
duas.translation: O Allah, guide me among those You have guided, pardon me among those You have pardoned, befriend me among those You have befriended, bless me in what You have granted, protect me from the evil that You have decreed, for You decree and none can decree over You. Whoever You befriend is not humbled. Blessed and Exalted are You, our Lord.

duas.title: Salat al-Istikharah
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْتَخِيرُكَ بِعِلْمِكَ، وَأَسْتَقْدِرُكَ بِقُدْرَتِكَ، وَأَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ الْعَظِيمِ، فَإِنَّكَ تَقْدِرُ وَلَا أَقْدِرُ، وَتَعْلَمُ وَلَا أَعْلَمُ، وَأَنْتَ عَلَّامُ الْغُيُوبِ. اللَّهُمَّ إِنْ كُنْتَ تَعْلَمُ أَنَّ هَذَا الْأَمْرَ خَيْرٌ لِي فِي دِينِي وَمَعَاشِي وَعَاقِبَةِ أَمْرِي فَاقْدُرْهُ لِي وَيَسِّرْهُ لِي ثُمَّ بَارِكْ لِي فِيهِ، وَإِنْ كُنْتَ تَعْلَمُ أَنَّ هَذَا الْأَمْرَ شَرٌّ لِي فِي دِينِي وَمَعَاشِي وَعَاقِبَةِ أَمْرِي فَاصْرِفْهُ عَنِّي وَاصْرِفْنِي عَنْهُ وَاقْدُرْ لِيَ الْخَيْرَ حَيْثُ كَانَ ثُمَّ أَرْضِنِي بِهِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni astakhiruka bi'ilmika, wa astaqdiruka biqudratika, wa as'aluka min fadlikal-'adheem, fa innaka taqdiru wa la aqdiru, wa ta'lamu wa la a'lamu, wa anta 'allamul-ghuyub. Allahumma in kunta ta'lamu anna hadhal-amra khayrun li fi deeni wa ma'ashi wa 'aqibati amri, faqdurhu li wa yassirhu li thumma barik li feehi, wa in kunta ta'lamu anna hadhal-amra sharrun li fi deeni wa ma'ashi wa 'aqibati amri, fasrifhu 'anni wasrifni 'anhu waqdur liyal-khayra haythu kana thumma ardini bihi.
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek Your guidance by virtue of Your knowledge, and I seek ability by virtue of Your power, and I ask You of Your great bounty. You have power, I have none. And You know, I know not. You are the Knower of hidden things. O Allah, if in Your knowledge this matter is good for my religion, my livelihood and my affairs, then ordain it for me, make it easy for me, and bless it for me. And if in Your knowledge this matter is bad for my religion, my livelihood and my affairs, then turn it away from me and turn me away from it, and ordain for me the good wherever it may be and make me content with it.
duas.virtue: The Prophet ﷺ used to teach his companions Istikharah for all matters, just as he would teach them a surah of the Quran.

categories.name: Trials & Protection
categories.description: Supplications for times of difficulty and seeking refuge

duas.title: Dua for Anxiety & Sorrow
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْهَمِّ وَالْحَزَنِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْعَجْزِ وَالْكَسَلِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْجُبْنِ وَالْبُخْلِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ غَلَبَةِ الدَّيْنِ، وَقَهْرِ الرِّجَالِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika minal-hammi wal-hazani, wa a'udhu bika minal-'ajzi wal-kasali, wa a'udhu bika minal-jubni wal-bukhli, wa a'udhu bika min ghalabatid-dayni wa qahrir-rijal.
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from anxiety and sorrow, weakness and laziness, miserliness and cowardice, the burden of debts and being overpowered by men.
duas.virtue: The Prophet ﷺ used to frequently recite this dua.

duas.title: Dua of Yunus (AS)
duas.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ سُبْحَانَكَ إِنِّي كُنْتُ مِنَ الظَّالِمِينَ
duas.transliteration: La ilaha illa anta subhanaka inni kuntu minaz-dhalimeen.
duas.translation: There is no deity except You; exalted are You. Indeed, I have been of the wrongdoers.
duas.virtue: No Muslim makes this dua regarding any matter except that Allah responds to him.

duas.title: When Overwhelmed
duas.arabic: لَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ
duas.transliteration: La hawla wa la quwwata illa billah.
duas.translation: There is no might nor power except with Allah.
duas.virtue: It is a treasure from the treasures of Paradise.

duas.title: Dua of the Distressed
duas.arabic: اللَّهُ اللَّهُ رَبِّي لَا أُشْرِكُ بِهِ شَيْئًا
duas.transliteration: Allahu Allahu Rabbi la ushriku bihi shay'an.
duas.translation: Allah, Allah is my Lord. I do not associate anything with Him.

duas.title: Protection for Children
duas.arabic: أُعِيذُكُمَا بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّةِ مِنْ كُلِّ شَيْطَانٍ وَهَامَّةٍ وَمِنْ كُلِّ عَيْنٍ لَامَّةٍ
duas.transliteration: U'idhukuma bikalimatillahit-tammati min kulli shaytanin wa hammatin wa min kulli 'aynin lammah.
duas.translation: I seek protection for you two in the perfect words of Allah from every devil, every poisonous creature, and every envious evil eye.
duas.virtue: The Prophet ﷺ used to seek refuge for Al-Hasan and Al-Husain with these words.

duas.title: Against Shaitan's Whispers
duas.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيمِ
duas.transliteration: A'udhu billahi minash-shaytanir-rajeem.
duas.translation: I seek refuge in Allah from the accursed Shaitan.

duas.title: Surah Al-Falaq
duas.arabic: قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ الْفَلَقِ ۝ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ ۝ وَمِنْ شَرِّ غَاسِقٍ إِذَا وَقَبَ ۝ وَمِنْ شَرِّ النَّفَّاثَاتِ فِي الْعُقَدِ ۝ وَمِنْ شَرِّ حَاسِدٍ إِذَا حَسَدَ
duas.transliteration: Qul a'udhu birabbil-falaq. Min sharri ma khalaq. Wa min sharri ghasiqin idha waqab. Wa min sharrin-naffathati fil-'uqad. Wa min sharri hasidin idha hasad.
duas.translation: Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of daybreak. From the evil of that which He created. And from the evil of darkness when it settles. And from the evil of the blowers in knots. And from the evil of an envier when he envies.

duas.title: Surah An-Nas
duas.arabic: قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ النَّاسِ ۝ مَلِكِ النَّاسِ ۝ إِلَٰهِ النَّاسِ ۝ مِنْ شَرِّ الْوَسْوَاسِ الْخَنَّاسِ ۝ الَّذِي يُوَسْوِسُ فِي صُدُورِ النَّاسِ ۝ مِنَ الْجِنَّةِ وَالنَّاسِ
duas.transliteration: Qul a'udhu birabbin-nas. Malikin-nas. Ilahin-nas. Min sharril-waswasil-khannas. Alladhi yuwaswisu fi sudurin-nas. Minal-jinnati wan-nas.
duas.translation: Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind. The Sovereign of mankind. The God of mankind. From the evil of the retreating whisperer. Who whispers in the breasts of mankind. Among jinn and among mankind.

duas.title: Dua for Repaying Debt
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اكْفِنِي بِحَلَالِكَ عَنْ حَرَامِكَ، وَأَغْنِنِي بِفَضْلِكَ عَمَّنْ سِوَاكَ
duas.transliteration: Allahummak-fini bihalalika 'an haramika, wa aghnini bifadlika 'amman siwak.
duas.translation: O Allah, suffice me with what You have allowed instead of what You have forbidden, and make me independent by Your grace from all besides You.
duas.virtue: Even if he had a debt the size of a mountain, Allah would help him pay it off.

duas.title: Seeking Provision
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ عِلْمًا نَافِعًا، وَرِزْقًا طَيِّبًا، وَعَمَلًا مُتَقَبَّلًا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka 'ilman nafi'an, wa rizqan tayyiban, wa 'amalan mutaqabbalan.
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for beneficial knowledge, good provision, and accepted deeds.

duas.title: Against Debt & Poverty
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْفَقْرِ وَالْقِلَّةِ وَالذِّلَّةِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ أَنْ أَظْلِمَ أَوْ أُظْلَمَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika minal-faqri wal-qillati wadh-dhillati, wa a'udhu bika min an adhlima aw udhlam.
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from poverty, scarcity, humiliation, and I seek refuge in You from wronging or being wronged.

duas.title: Simple Istighfar
duas.arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْهِ
duas.transliteration: Astaghfirullaha wa atubu ilayhi.
duas.translation: I seek Allah's forgiveness and I repent to Him.
duas.virtue: The Prophet ﷺ used to seek forgiveness from Allah more than 70 times a day.

duas.title: Comprehensive Istighfar
duas.arabic: رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي وَتُبْ عَلَيَّ إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ التَّوَّابُ الرَّحِيمُ
duas.transliteration: Rabbighfir li wa tub 'alayya innaka antat-Tawwabur-Raheem.
duas.translation: My Lord, forgive me and accept my repentance. Indeed, You are the Accepter of Repentance, the Most Merciful.

duas.title: Seeking Forgiveness (Expanded)
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ رَبِّي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ، خَلَقْتَنِي وَأَنَا عَبْدُكَ، وَأَنَا عَلَى عَهْدِكَ وَوَعْدِكَ مَا اسْتَطَعْتُ، أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا صَنَعْتُ، أَبُوءُ لَكَ بِنِعْمَتِكَ عَلَيَّ وَأَبُوءُ لَكَ بِذَنْبِي فَاغْفِرْ لِي فَإِنَّهُ لَا يَغْفِرُ الذُّنُوبَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma anta Rabbi la ilaha illa Anta, khalaqtani wa ana 'abduka, wa ana 'ala 'ahdika wa wa'dika mastata't, a'udhu bika min sharri ma sana't, abu'u laka bi ni'matika 'alayya, wa abu'u laka bi dhanbi, faghfir li fa innahu la yaghfirudh-dhunuba illa Anta.
duas.translation: O Allah, You are my Lord, there is no deity but You. You created me and I am Your servant. I uphold Your covenant and promise as best I can. I seek refuge in You from the evil of what I have done. I acknowledge Your blessings upon me, and I acknowledge my sin, so forgive me, for verily none forgives sins except You.
duas.virtue: This is Sayyid al-Istighfar (the master of seeking forgiveness).

categories.name: Social & Nature
categories.description: Duas for social interactions and natural events

duas.title: Before Eating
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ
duas.transliteration: Bismillah.
duas.translation: In the name of Allah.
duas.virtue: When one of you eats, mention the name of Allah. If he forgets at the beginning, let him say: Bismillahi fi awwalihi wa akhirihi.

duas.title: After Eating
duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَطْعَمَنِي هَذَا، وَرَزَقَنِيهِ مِنْ غَيْرِ حَوْلٍ مِنِّي وَلَا قُوَّةٍ
duas.transliteration: Alhamdu lillahilladhi at'amani hadha wa razaqaneehi min ghayri hawlin minni wa la quwwah.
duas.translation: All praise is for Allah who fed me this and provided it for me without any might nor power from me.
duas.virtue: Whoever says this after eating, his past sins will be forgiven.

duas.title: Dua for the Host
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لَهُمْ فِيمَا رَزَقْتَهُمْ، وَاغْفِرْ لَهُمْ وَارْحَمْهُمْ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma barik lahum feema razaqtahum, waghfir lahum warhamhum.
duas.translation: O Allah, bless for them what You have provided them, forgive them and have mercy upon them.

duas.title: Before Drinking Water
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ
duas.transliteration: Bismillah.
duas.translation: In the name of Allah.

duas.title: After Drinking Milk
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لَنَا فِيهِ وَزِدْنَا مِنْهُ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma barik lana feehi wa zidna minhu.
duas.translation: O Allah, bless it for us and give us more of it.

duas.title: Dua for Travel
duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي سَخَّرَ لَنَا هَذَا وَمَا كُنَّا لَهُ مُقْرِنِينَ وَإِنَّا إِلَى رَبِّنَا لَمُنْقَلِبُونَ
duas.transliteration: Subhanal-ladhi sakhkhara lana hadha wa ma kunna lahu muqrineen, wa inna ila Rabbina lamunqalibun.
duas.translation: Glory is to Him who has subjected this for us, for we could never have accomplished this ourselves, and to our Lord we shall return.

duas.title: Farewell Dua (for traveler)
duas.arabic: أَسْتَوْدِعُ اللَّهَ دِينَكَ، وَأَمَانَتَكَ، وَخَوَاتِيمَ عَمَلِكَ
duas.transliteration: Astawdi'ullaha deenaka, wa amanataka, wa khawateema 'amalik.
duas.translation: I entrust to Allah your religion, your trust, and the outcomes of your deeds.

duas.title: Upon Returning from Travel
duas.arabic: آيِبُونَ تَائِبُونَ عَابِدُونَ لِرَبِّنَا حَامِدُونَ
duas.transliteration: Ayibuna ta'ibuna 'abiduna li Rabbina hamidun.
duas.translation: We return, repentant, worshipping, and praising our Lord.

duas.title: Entering a New Town
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ السَّمَاوَاتِ السَّبْعِ وَمَا أَظْلَلْنَ، وَرَبَّ الْأَرَضِينَ السَّبْعِ وَمَا أَقْلَلْنَ، وَرَبَّ الشَّيَاطِينِ وَمَا أَضْلَلْنَ، وَرَبَّ الرِّيَاحِ وَمَا ذَرَيْنَ، أَسْأَلُكَ خَيْرَ هَذِهِ الْقَرْيَةِ وَخَيْرَ أَهْلِهَا وَخَيْرَ مَا فِيهَا، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّهَا وَشَرِّ أَهْلِهَا وَشَرِّ مَا فِيهَا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma Rabbas-samawatis-sab'i wa ma adhlaln, wa Rabbal-aradinas-sab'i wa ma aqlal, wa Rabbash-shayateeni wa ma adlaln, wa Rabbar-riyahi wa ma dharayn, as'aluka khayra hadhihil-qaryati wa khayra ahlihaa wa khayra ma feeha, wa a'udhu bika min sharrihaa wa sharri ahlihaa wa sharri ma feeha.
duas.translation: O Allah, Lord of the seven heavens and all they shade, Lord of the seven earths and all they hold, Lord of the devils and all they misguide, Lord of the winds and all they scatter, I ask You for the good of this town, the good of its people, and the good of what is in it. I seek refuge in You from its evil, the evil of its people, and the evil of what is in it.

duas.title: When It Rains
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَيِّبًا نَافِعًا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma sayyiban nafi'an.
duas.translation: O Allah, let it be a beneficial rain.

duas.title: After Rain
duas.arabic: مُطِرْنَا بِفَضْلِ اللَّهِ وَرَحْمَتِهِ
duas.transliteration: Mutirna bifadlillahi wa rahmatihi.
duas.translation: We have been given rain by the grace and mercy of Allah.

duas.title: When Hearing Thunder
duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي يُسَبِّحُ الرَّعْدُ بِحَمْدِهِ وَالْمَلَائِكَةُ مِنْ خِيفَتِهِ
duas.transliteration: Subhanal-ladhi yusabbihur-ra'du bihamdihi wal-mala'ikatu min kheefatihi.
duas.translation: Glory is to Him whom the thunder glorifies with His praise, and the angels too out of fear of Him.

duas.title: When Wind Blows
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ خَيْرَهَا وَخَيْرَ مَا فِيهَا وَخَيْرَ مَا أُرْسِلَتْ بِهِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّهَا وَشَرِّ مَا فِيهَا وَشَرِّ مَا أُرْسِلَتْ بِهِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka khayrahaa wa khayra ma feehaa wa khayra ma ursilat bihi, wa a'udhu bika min sharrihaa wa sharri ma feehaa wa sharri ma ursilat bihi.
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for its good, the good in it, and the good it was sent with. I seek refuge in You from its evil, the evil in it, and the evil it was sent with.

duas.title: Visiting the Sick
duas.arabic: لَا بَأْسَ طَهُورٌ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ
duas.transliteration: La ba'sa, tahurun insha'Allah.
duas.translation: No worry, it is a purification, if Allah wills.

duas.title: Dua for Healing
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ النَّاسِ أَذْهِبِ الْبَأْسَ، اشْفِهِ وَأَنْتَ الشَّافِي، لَا شِفَاءَ إِلَّا شِفَاؤُكَ، شِفَاءً لَا يُغَادِرُ سَقَمًا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma Rabban-nasi adhhibil-ba'sa, ishfihi wa antash-shafi, la shifa'a illa shifa'uka, shifa'an la yughadiru saqaman.
duas.translation: O Allah, Lord of mankind, remove the harm, heal him, for You are the Healer. There is no healing except Your healing — a healing that leaves no disease behind.
duas.virtue: The Prophet ﷺ used to place his right hand on the sick and say this.

duas.title: When in Pain
duas.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِعِزَّةِ اللَّهِ وَقُدْرَتِهِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا أَجِدُ وَأُحَاذِرُ
duas.transliteration: A'udhu bi'izzatillahi wa qudratihi min sharri ma ajidu wa uhadhiru.
duas.translation: I seek refuge in the might and power of Allah from the evil of what I am experiencing and what I fear.
duas.virtue: Place your hand on the area of pain and say Bismillah three times, then say this dua seven times.

duas.title: Upon Hearing Death News
duas.arabic: إِنَّا لِلَّهِ وَإِنَّا إِلَيْهِ رَاجِعُونَ، اللَّهُمَّ أْجُرْنِي فِي مُصِيبَتِي وَأَخْلِفْ لِي خَيْرًا مِنْهَا
duas.transliteration: Inna lillahi wa inna ilayhi raji'un, Allahumma-jurni fi musibati wa akhlif li khayran minha.
duas.translation: Indeed we belong to Allah, and indeed to Him we will return. O Allah, reward me in my affliction and replace it for me with something better.
duas.virtue: Whoever says this, Allah will reward him in his affliction and replace it with something better.

duas.title: Funeral Prayer (Janazah)
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لَهُ وَارْحَمْهُ، وَعَافِهِ، وَاعْفُ عَنْهُ، وَأَكْرِمْ نُزُلَهُ، وَوَسِّعْ مُدْخَلَهُ، وَاغْسِلْهُ بِالْمَاءِ وَالثَّلْجِ وَالْبَرَدِ، وَنَقِّهِ مِنَ الْخَطَايَا كَمَا نَقَّيْتَ الثَّوْبَ الْأَبْيَضَ مِنَ الدَّنَسِ
duas.transliteration: Allahummaghfir lahu warhamhu, wa 'afihi, wa'fu 'anhu, wa akrim nuzulahu, wa wassi' mudkhalahu, waghsilhu bil-ma'i wath-thalji wal-barad, wa naqqihi minal-khataya kama naqqaytath-thawbal-abyada minad-danas.
duas.translation: O Allah, forgive him and have mercy on him, keep him safe and sound and forgive him, honour his resting place and make his entrance wide. Wash him with water, snow and ice, and cleanse him of his transgressions as white cloth is cleansed of stains.
